code_1:
from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer

model = SentenceTransformer(
    "nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5",
    trust_remote_code=True
)
code_3:
query = "search_query: What is the best movie about dreams?"

doc = "search_document: Dom Cobb is a skilled thief who steals secrets from deep within the subconscious during the dream state."

query_emb = model.encode(query, normalize_embeddings=True)
doc_emb = model.encode(doc, normalize_embeddings=True)
code_4:
corpus = [
"The Matrix: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality.",
"Titanic: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.",
"Avengers: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team.",
"Interstellar: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.",
"Shrek: A mean lord exiles fairytale creatures to the swamp of a grumpy ogre."
]

corpus_with_prefix = ["search_document: " + doc for doc in corpus]

corpus_embeddings = model.encode(corpus_with_prefix, normalize_embeddings=True)

scores = corpus_embeddings @ query_emb.T

top_k_indices = np.argsort(scores)[::-1][:3]

similarity = query_emb @ doc_emb.T
code_5:
# 'model' and 'query_emb' are available
corpus = [
    "The Matrix: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality.",
    "Titanic: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.",
    "Avengers: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team.",
    "Interstellar: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.",
    "Shrek: A mean lord exiles fairytale creatures to the swamp of a grumpy ogre."]

corpus_with_prefix = ["search_document: " + doc for doc in corpus]
corpus_embeddings = model.encode(corpus_with_prefix, normalize_embeddings=True)
scores = corpus_embeddings @ query_emb.T
top_k_indices = np.argsort(scores)[::-1][:3]
lab3_user_answer: A search engine should distinguish between a query and a document because they play different roles. A query is usually short and expresses the user’s intent, while a document is longer and contains detailed content. Treating them differently helps the model produce better embeddings for matching user intent to relevant documents.
